requirements.title: Employee Lifecycle Workflow: Employee Onboarding end-to-end workflow

Payroll Validation: Payroll Run validation - All active employees have payroll profiles
Payroll Validation: Payroll Run validation - Bank details are verified
Payroll Validation: Payroll Run validation - Negative net pay requires exception approval

Attendance Workflow: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control end-to-end workflow
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - Requested time falls inside shift tolerance
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - Reason and evidence are present for missing punch
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - No conflicting leave exists
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - Check-out cannot be earlier than check-in
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - Overtime hours cannot exceed policy cap
Attendance Validation: Attendance Capture, Regularization, and Overtime Control validation - Payroll readiness requires all attendance exceptions closed
